file.content:
name: Build Test and Install
description: "Builds the binaries, runs the tests, and installs the library"

inputs:
  numcpp_no_use_boost:
    description: “NUMCPP_NO_USE_BOOST compiler flag”
    required: true
  shell:
    description: the shell to use
    required: true
  boost_root:
    description: the root of the boost installation
    required: true
  cxx_std_version:
    description: the c++ standard to use for compilation
    required: false
    default: 17
  numcpp_use_multithread:
    description: compile with multithread support
    required: false
    default: false
  sudo:
    description: run command with sudo
    required: false
    default: ""

runs:
  using: "composite"
  steps:
    - name: Configure CMake
      shell: ${{inputs.shell}}
      run: cmake -B ${{github.workspace}}/build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DCMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=${{inputs.cxx_std_version}} -DBOOST_ROOT=${{inputs.boost_root}} -DNUMCPP_NO_USE_BOOST=${{inputs.numcpp_no_use_boost}} -DNUMCPP_USE_MULTITHREAD=${{inputs.numcpp_use_multithread}} -DBUILD_TESTS=ON -DBUILD_MULTIPLE_TEST=ON -DBUILD_EXAMPLE_README=ON -DBUILD_EXAMPLE_GAUSS_NEWTON_NLLS=ON

    - name: Build
      shell: ${{inputs.shell}}
      run: cmake --build ${{github.workspace}}/build --config Release -j88

    - name: pytest
      shell: ${{inputs.shell}}
      working-directory: ${{github.workspace}}/test/pytest
      run: pytest

    - name: ctest
      shell: ${{inputs.shell}}
      working-directory: ${{github.workspace}}/build
      run: ctest -R BinaryLoggerTestSuite -R LoggerTestSuite

    - name: Install
      shell: ${{inputs.shell}}
      working-directory: ${{github.workspace}}
      run: ${{inputs.sudo}} cmake --build ${{github.workspace}}/build --config Release --target install

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    build-essential \
    clang \
    lsb-release \
    wget \
    software-properties-common \
    gnupg \
    git \
    cmake \
    libboost-all-dev \
    python3-dev \
    curl \
    ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN wget -O /tmp/miniconda.sh https://repo.anaconda.com/miniconda/Miniconda3-latest-Linux-x86_64.sh && \
    bash /tmp/miniconda.sh -b -p /opt/miniconda && \
    rm /tmp/miniconda.sh

ENV PATH="/opt/miniconda/bin:$PATH"

RUN conda config --system --prepend channels conda-forge && \
    conda config --system --set auto_update_conda false && \
    conda install -y python=3.12 pip numpy=2.2 astropy scipy matplotlib mpmath pytest boost tbb tbb-devel gtest gmock && \
    pip install pymap3d vectormath && \
    conda clean -y --all

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    build-essential \
    clang \
    lsb-release \
    wget \
    software-properties-common \
    gnupg \
    git \
    cmake \
    libboost-all-dev \
    python3-dev \
    curl \
    ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN wget -O /tmp/miniconda.sh https://repo.anaconda.com/miniconda/Miniconda3-latest-Linux-x86_64.sh && \
    bash /tmp/miniconda.sh -b -p /opt/miniconda && \
    rm /tmp/miniconda.sh

ENV PATH="/opt/miniconda/bin:$PATH"

RUN conda config --system --prepend channels conda-forge && \
    conda config --system --set auto_update_conda false && \
    conda install -y python=3.12 pip numpy=2.2 astropy scipy matplotlib mpmath pytest boost tbb tbb-devel gtest gmock && \
    pip install pymap3d vectormath && \
    conda clean -y --all

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    build-essential \
    clang \
    lsb-release \
    wget \
    software-properties-common \
    gnupg \
    git \
    cmake \
    libboost-all-dev \
    python3-dev \
    curl \
    ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN wget -O /tmp/miniconda.sh https://repo.anaconda.com/miniconda/Miniconda3-latest-Linux-x86_64.sh && \
    bash /tmp/miniconda.sh -b -p /opt/miniconda && \
    rm /tmp/miniconda.sh

ENV PATH="/opt/miniconda/bin:$PATH"

RUN conda config --system --set auto_update_conda false && \
    conda install -y python=3.12 pip numpy=2.2 astropy scipy matplotlib mpmath pytest boost tbb tbb-devel gtest gmock && \
    pip install pymap3d vectormath && \
    conda clean -y --all

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]
